title: Ford bets on Apple for its next-generation of EVs
summary: Apple on Thursday announced a new set of developer tools that will let automakers embed Apple Maps navigation and mapping directly into their vehicles’ infotainment systems. The companies have signed a commercial agreement, but did not disclosed its terms.
